name: Peanut Butter Scotch Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE PEANUT BUTTER, MARGARINE, VANILLA AND LIQUID BROWN SUGAR. MIX UNTIL SMOOTH.
2. BEAT IN EGGS.
3. STIR IN REMAINING INGREDIENTS. MIX WELL.
4. SPOON BATTER INTO A GREASED 13X9X2 INCH BAKING PAN. SPREAD SMOOTH.
5. BAKE IN A 350°F OVEN FOR 35 MINUTES OR UNTIL DONE. MAKES 36 SQUARES.
